candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; matches Net Sales numerically and is the clearest total revenue row.
Not revenue; cost row.

candidates.row_label: Losses on sales of non-current assets
candidates.why: Non-operating/other item, not revenue.
Operating expense, not revenue.
Other income, not core revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total revenue row from the candidate list.

candidates.why: Direct COGS label for years where reported explicitly.
Alternate direct COGS label; appears to duplicate Cost of goods sold in some years.
Likely earlier-period cost-of-sales style label when explicit COGS is absent.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods sold - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row; should be avoided when direct rows exist.

variables.notes: Using a priority list to cover label changes across years; excluded balancing rows.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A component.
Clear SG&A component.
Personnel overhead bucket; useful for years where SG&A is presented by nature.
Broad overhead bucket, but generic and empty-looking in preview; less preferred than components.
Broad overhead bucket excluding D&A line items listed separately; useful for years presented by nature.
Dedicated R&D line above operating profit; include in XSGA as well if not clearly embedded elsewhere so XSGA-XRD removes it.
SG&A-type component but appears to be a subcomponent of Other Operating Expenses, so less preferred if broader bucket is chosen.
SG&A-type component but likely subcomponent of Other Operating Expenses.
Overhead-type subcomponent but likely nested within Other Operating Expenses.
Supplemental/empty label, not preferable.
Supplemental R&D disclosure, not preferred over primary statement row.
Balance sheet row; not an income statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No single explicit populated SG&A total row is available. Selected overhead components/buckets and included the dedicated above-EBIT R&D row so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD can remove R&D where separately disclosed. Excluded D&A, impairments, totals, balancing rows, and likely subcomponents already contained within broader buckets.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D line on the primary income statement and above Operating profit.
Supplemental disclosure; less preferred than primary statement row.

variables.notes: Preferred the primary statement R&D row above EBIT; kept supplemental row as fallback for years where the main row may be unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Financial expenses Share of profit/loss in associates and joint
candidates.why: Broad/misclassified finance line, not specifically interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses from other liabilities at amortised cost
candidates.why: Most direct and preferred interest expense label.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses from interest rate derivatives
candidates.why: Interest-related but derivative-specific; less preferred than borrowing interest.
Too broad; fallback only if no direct interest line exists.
Direct interest expense for leases; good fallback/secondary line.
Generic finance total; weak fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease-interest concept.
Generic explicit interest label, but preview shows no values; useful as low-priority fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses from other liabilities at amortised cost

variables.notes: Priority list favors direct borrowing interest expense, then lease interest, then a generic interest label. Excluded broad finance totals and associate/share-of-profit lines.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet book equity.
Not a balance sheet equity total.
Not shareholders' equity.
Component of equity, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line and excludes non-controlling interests.
Total equity including non-controlling interests, so less preferred when owner equity exists.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet minority interest / NCI line.
Equivalent balance sheet label; likely alternate/duplicate.

variables.notes: Selected the direct balance sheet non-controlling interests row; did not use income statement attribution rows.
